item.title: The State of Identity Security 2026: Identity is the new perimeter
item.description:
Discover the causes and consequences of identity threats based on a survey of 5,000 organizations across 17 countries.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: identity, Identity Security, Ransomware

item.title: May’s Patch Tuesday hauls out 132 CVEs
item.description:
With advisories, this month’s count approaches 300 – though many are already in place

Categories: Threat Research, X-ops

Tags: Patch Tuesday, MICROSOFT PATCH TUESDAY

item.title: Why AMOS matters: The macOS malware stealing data at scale
item.description:
Sophos X-Ops looks at the Atomic macOS Stealer and its capabilities

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: MacOS, AMOS, infostealer

item.title: WantToCry ransomware remotely encrypts files
item.description:
Brute-force attempts against SMB services can be early signs of an attack

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: Ransomware, WantToCry, SMB

item.title: GitHub internal repositories breached.
item.description:
A malicious VS Code extension led to cloned private repositories, reportedly offered for sale on a criminal forum

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: GitHub, Supply chain

item.title: Sophos Firewall and Synchronized Security
item.description:
Synchronized Security is a unique capability you won’t get anywhere else.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: network, Firewall, Synchronized Security

item.title: Sophos named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Endpoint Protection for the 17th consecutive report
item.description:
Strong endpoint protection remains critical. But in today’s AI-driven threat environment, it's most powerful when it's part of a broader, coordinated defense.

Categories: Products & Services

Tags: Gartner, Gartner Magic Quadrant, Endpoint, Sophos Endpoint

item.title: Encore Performance: Sophos ranked #1 Overall in Endpoint, EDR, XDR, MDR, and Firewall for the 2nd consecutive time in the G2 Summer 2026 Reports

item.description:
